title: Extend eraser tool to erase all elements and free transform tool to move/resize icons

requirements.text: Extend the eraser tool (button 7 in the toolbar, tool type 'eraser') in AttackPathCanvas.tsx so that it can erase all diagram element types: icons (DiagramIcon), text labels (TextLabel), freehand drawings (FreehandDrawing), lines/arrows (Line/Connection), and image elements (Image). When the eraser is active and a user clicks or drags over any of these elements, they should be removed from the diagram state.

quotes: The eraser should also be able to erase everything in the diagram (icons, text, tools)

acceptanceCriteria: Eraser tool removes icons/attack path nodes when clicked or dragged over them
Eraser tool removes text labels when clicked or dragged over them
Eraser tool removes freehand drawings when clicked or dragged over them
Eraser tool removes line and arrow connections when clicked or dragged over them
Eraser tool removes image elements when clicked or dragged over them
All other toolbar tools remain unaffected

requirements.text: Extend the free transform tool (button 8 in the toolbar, tool type 'freeTransform') in AttackPathCanvas.tsx to support selecting, moving, and resizing icon elements (DiagramIcon/AttackPathIcon) in the diagram. When the free transform tool is active, clicking an icon should show selection handles that allow the user to drag to move the icon and drag corner/edge handles to resize it, consistent with how images and text labels already support free transform.

quotes: The free transform tool should also able move and resize the icons in the diagram

acceptanceCriteria: Activating the free transform tool and clicking an icon displays a selection bounding box with resize handles
Dragging an icon while free transform is active moves it to the new position
Dragging a corner or edge handle resizes the icon proportionally or freely
Icon position and size changes are persisted to diagram state
Existing free transform behavior for images and text labels is not broken

constraints: Only modify behavior for toolbar button 7 (eraser) and button 8 (free transform) as identified by the selected XPath elements
Do not alter the backend data model or CRUD operations
Do not edit any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Adding new toolbar tools or buttons
Changing the visual design of the toolbar
Modifying undo/redo history behavior beyond what is needed to support these changes
